scripts.lint: python -m py_compile scripts/native_desktop_e2e.py && node --check playwright.config.mjs && node --check apps/desktop/e2e/desktop-shell.e2e.spec.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/index.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/i18n.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/i18n.test.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/keyboard-shortcuts.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/keyboard-shortcuts.test.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/menu-model.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/menu-model.test.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/workspace-layout.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/workspace-layout.test.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/workspace-resize.mjs && node --check packages/ui/src/workspace-resize.test.mjs && node --check packages/viewport/src/index.mjs && node --check packages/viewport/src/aerospace-scenes.mjs && node --check packages/viewport/src/aerospace-scenes.test.mjs && npm --workspace @futureaero/desktop run build
scripts.test: node --test packages/ui/src/i18n.test.mjs packages/ui/src/keyboard-shortcuts.test.mjs packages/ui/src/menu-model.test.mjs packages/ui/src/workspace-layout.test.mjs packages/ui/src/workspace-resize.test.mjs packages/viewport/src/aerospace-scenes.test.mjs && npm --workspace @futureaero/desktop run test
scripts.typecheck: node -e "console.log('TypeScript n est pas encore branche. Menu model verifie via lint + tests Node.')"
